'''shothashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylicolous|xylicolous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylicolous|xylicolous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shothashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shothashithi|shothashithi]] || [[word:shothashiji|shothashiji]] || [[word:shothashishi|shothashishi]] || [[word:shothashiki|shothashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shothashuthuthu|shothashuthuthu]] || [[word:shothashujuju|shothashujuju]] || [[word:shothashushushu|shothashushushu]] || [[word:shothashukuku|shothashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shothashuthu|shothashuthu]] || [[word:shothashuju|shothashuju]] || [[word:shothashushu|shothashushu]] || [[word:shothashuku|shothashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shothashufthuf|shothashufthuf]] || [[word:shothashufjuf|shothashufjuf]] || [[word:shothashufshuf|shothashufshuf]] || [[word:shothashufkuf|shothashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shothashethe|shothashethe]] || [[word:shothasheje|shothasheje]] || [[word:shothasheshe|shothasheshe]] || [[word:shothasheke|shothasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shothashothotho|shothashothotho]] || [[word:shothashojojo|shothashojojo]] || [[word:shothashoshosho|shothashoshosho]] || [[word:shothashokoko|shothashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shothashotho|shothashotho]] || [[word:shothashojo|shothashojo]] || [[word:shothashosho|shothashosho]] || [[word:shothashoko|shothashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shothashofthof|shothashofthof]] || [[word:shothashofjof|shothashofjof]] || [[word:shothashofshof|shothashofshof]] || [[word:shothashofkof|shothashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfthĂŻf|shothashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfjĂŻf|shothashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfshĂŻf|shothashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfkĂŻf|shothashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shothashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shothashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shothashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shothashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfthĂŻf|shothashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfjĂŻf|shothashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfshĂŻf|shothashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfkĂŻf|shothashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfthĂŻf|shothashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfjĂŻf|shothashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfshĂŻf|shothashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shothashĂŻfkĂŻf|shothashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shothashĂŠthĂŠ|shothashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shothashĂŠjĂŠ|shothashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shothashĂŠshĂŠ|shothashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shothashĂŠkĂŠ|shothashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shothashathatha|shothashathatha]] || [[word:shothashajaja|shothashajaja]] || [[word:shothashashasha|shothashashasha]] || [[word:shothashakaka|shothashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shothashatha|shothashatha]] || [[word:shothashaja|shothashaja]] || [[word:shothashasha|shothashasha]] || [[word:shothashaka|shothashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shothashafthaf|shothashafthaf]] || [[word:shothashafjaf|shothashafjaf]] || [[word:shothashafshaf|shothashafshaf]] || [[word:shothashafkaf|shothashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shothashasha|shothashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shothashshĂ«asha|shothashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shothashroasha|shothashroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shothashmuasha|shothashmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shothashyaasha|shothashyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshothashnkshĂ«asha|goshothashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshothashnkroasha|goshothashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshothashnkmuasha|goshothashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshothashnkyaasha|goshothashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shothathashasha|shothathashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shothathashshĂ«asha|shothathashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shothathashroasha|shothathashroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shothathashmuasha|shothathashmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shothathashyaasha|shothathashyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshothathashnkshĂ«asha|goshothathashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshothathashnkroasha|goshothathashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshothathashnkmuasha|goshothathashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshothathashnkyaasha|goshothathashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shethĂŠshasha|shethĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shethĂŠshshĂ«asha|shethĂŠshshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shethĂŠshroasha|shethĂŠshroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shethĂŠshmuasha|shethĂŠshmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shethĂŠshyaasha|shethĂŠshyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshethĂŠshnkshĂ«asha|goshethĂŠshnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshethĂŠshnkroasha|goshethĂŠshnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshethĂŠshnkmuasha|goshethĂŠshnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshethĂŠshnkyaasha|goshethĂŠshnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shothfashasha|shothfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shothfashshĂ«asha|shothfashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shothfashroasha|shothfashroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shothfashmuasha|shothfashmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shothfashyaasha|shothfashyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshothfashnkshĂ«asha|goshothfashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshothfashnkroasha|goshothfashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshothfashnkmuasha|goshothfashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshothfashnkyaasha|goshothfashnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
